# Security Policy

This repository contains the static landing page for Kai's Hitorigaisha
(<https://hitorigaisha.kaichen.dev>). It is plain HTML/CSS: no server
code, no user accounts, no data collection.

For issues in the **Hitorigaisha OS project** itself, please use the
[Hitorigaisha-OS repository](https://github.com/Kai-s-Hitorigaisha/Hitorigaisha-OS)
instead.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do NOT report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

If you find a security issue in this site — for example content injection,
a compromised link, or anything that could mislead visitors — report it via:

1. **GitHub Security Advisory**: [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/Kai-s-Hitorigaisha/Kai-s-Hitorigaisha.github.io/security/advisories/new) (recommended)
2. **Direct contact**: message the maintainer through GitHub

Please include a description of the issue, its potential impact, and steps
to reproduce. You can expect an initial response within a week.

Thank you for helping keep visitors safe! 🔒
